name: Animal Science 4-H Club
description: Learn about animal care, nutrition, and behavior through hands-on activities and trips to farms and animal facilities.

name: Baird Homestead 4-H Club
description: Members help maintain the historic homestead, care for animals, and host events like the annual High Tea.

name: Curry Combs 4-H Club
description: One of the oldest horse clubs focusing on English riding, horse science, and competitions.

name: Hearts and Horseshoes
description: Beginner and intermediate riders learn about horses, anatomy, tack, and riding styles through farm visits.

name: Monmouth Livestock
description: Members raise livestock, build friendships, and prepare animals to show at the Monmouth County Fair.

name: Raging Reptiles
description: Explore reptiles and their environments while learning proper care and conservation.

name: Stars and Strides
description: Horse enthusiasts practice riding skills, obstacle courses, horse care, and crafts.

name: Tails and Trails
description: Members care for rabbits, chickens, and other small animals while promoting rescue and education.

name: Kindness Club
description: Focuses on community service such as beach cleanups, coat drives, and helping local organizations.

name: Wildroots Wilderness Survival
description: Teaches survival skills, leadership, and environmental awareness through outdoor challenges.

name: Teen Council
description: Teen leaders organize activities and service projects for the Monmouth County 4-H community.

name: Globetasters Cooking Club
description: Virtual cooking club exploring international cuisine and cultures through hands-on recipes.

name: Wildlings
description: Environmental education club focused on nature, health, and outdoor exploration.

name: Monmouth Blasters
description: Members design and launch model rockets while learning engineering and aviation.

name: Dungeons and Dragons Club
description: Role-playing adventures that build teamwork, creativity, and strategic thinking.

name: It's Awl Good Builders
description: Woodworking and building projects that support 4-H programs and community education.

name: Shooting Stars
description: Members learn rifle safety, discipline, and shooting techniques with trained instructors.
